steps.title: Identify the exponential form
steps.content: The equation $D = 4320 \times (1.7)^t$ is an exponential function with the standard form $D = a \times b^t$. Here, the coefficient $a = 4320$ and the growth factor $b = 1.7$. In exponential functions, the coefficient represents the initial value when the exponent equals zero.

steps.title: Evaluate at t = 0 to find the initial value
steps.content:
Since $t$ represents years after 2012, when $t = 0$ we are at the year 2012. Substituting $t = 0$:
$$D = 4320 \times (1.7)^0 = 4320 \times 1 = 4320$$
The value 4,320 terabytes is the estimated data traffic at $t = 0$, which is the year 2012. That confirms D is correct.
